overall.description: A bus simulator game showing first-person perspective from the driver's seat during a heavy rainstorm. The bus drives through an urban environment with modern apartment buildings, stops at a red traffic light behind other vehicles, then proceeds through the intersection. Windshield wipers are active throughout the clip, and the wet road surfaces reflect the overcast lighting.

coming to complete stop behind black sedan at the red light

segments.scene_description: The bus drives along a wet city street in heavy rain, with modern apartment buildings and trees lining both sides. The windshield wipers move continuously as the vehicle approaches a red traffic light, slowing down to stop behind a red sedan and near a parked white van.

windshield wipers sweep across the windshield clearing heavy rain

concrete barrier separating lanes on the left side

segments.scene_description: The bus remains stationary at a red traffic light behind a black sedan. The windshield wipers continue to sweep back and forth, clearing the heavy rain. Modern glass buildings are visible on the right, and the street is lined with parked cars.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection crossing with green traffic light

events.description: traffic light turns green, vehicles begin moving through the intersection
accelerating from stop through the wide intersection

agents.ego_description: accelerating through green light at intersection, following the black sedan ahead

segments.scene_description: The traffic light turns green and the bus accelerates through the wide intersection, following the black sedan. The scene opens up with more sky visible, and road cones appear on the right side near a bus stop shelter. The bus crosses zebra markings and red bicycle lane paint.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with parked cars and bus stops

events.description: passing parked cars and bus stop shelter on the right side

agents.ego_description: cruising down city street in heavy rain, passing other vehicles and parked cars

segments.scene_description: After clearing the intersection, the bus continues down the city street, passing a bus stop shelter and parked cars on the right. A white car passes in the opposite direction on the left. The heavy rain continues with wipers active, and the street stretches ahead with apartment buildings and trees lining both sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a bus driver's seat as the vehicle navigates a rain-slicked urban corridor, transitioning from a slow approach to a stop and then accelerating through a wide intersection. It begins with the bus driving along a wet city street lined with modern apartment buildings and trees, slowing down as it approaches a red traffic light to stop behind a sedan. While stationary, the camera captures the rhythmic sweep of the windshield wipers against the heavy rain and the reflection of glass buildings on the right. As the light turns green, the scene opens up and the bus accelerates through the intersection, crossing zebra markings and red bicycle lanes past road cones and a bus stop shelter. The movement finally stabilizes as the bus continues down the street, passing a white car in the opposite direction while the urban landscape of trees and apartments stretches ahead under the persistent downpour.
